name: SABINE ROYALTY TRUST
summary: Sabine Royalty Trust (SBR) is a statutory trust that holds royalty interests in oil and gas properties. The Trust receives royalty income from these interests and distributes proceeds to unit holders. Argent Trust Company serves as Trustee. As of December 31, 2025, the Trust held proved reserves evaluated by independent petroleum engineers DeGolyer and MacNaughton.
